utterances.source_text: Wir liegen beim Kundendossier etwas zurück, daher muss die Freigabe auf nächste Woche verschoben werden.
utterances.production_ground_truth: On are slightly behind on the client file, so the approval will need to be moved to next week.

utterance_translations.text: On are slightly behind on the client file, so the approval will need to be moved to next week.

utterances.source_text: Ich bin rausgegangen, um Brot zu kaufen, habe mich in ein Gespräch mit dem Nachbarn verwickelt und die Bäckerei völlig vergessen.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I went out to buy bread, got sidetracked by a chat with the neighbor, and ended up forgetting the bakery entirely.

utterance_translations.text: I went out to buy bread, got sidetracked by a chat with the neighbor, and ended up forgetting the bakery entirely.

utterances.source_text: Danke, dass Sie da sind. Ich stelle zuerst das Projekt vor und gehe dann auf Budget und Zeitplan ein.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Thank you for being here. I’ll first outline the project, then cover the budget and timeline.

utterance_translations.text: Thank you for being here. I’ll first outline the project, then cover the budget and timeline.

utterances.source_text: So können wir nicht weitermachen: Weniger Wartung spart kaum etwas und führt später zu schweren Ausfällen.
utterances.production_ground_truth: We cannot keep doing this: cutting maintenance saves very little and leads to major breakdowns later.

utterance_translations.text: We cannot keep doing this: cutting maintenance saves very little and leads to major breakdowns later.

utterances.source_text: Ich erinnere mich noch an den alten Bahnhof; dort verbrachten wir Sonntage mit meinem Bruder und blieben stundenlang in dem kleinen Café.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I still remember the old station; we spent Sundays there with my brother and stayed for hours in its little café.

utterance_translations.text: I still remember the old station; we spent Sundays there with my brother and stayed for hours in its little café.

utterances.source_text: Der Cache ist ein kleiner Speicher nahe am Prozessor, der Dinge beschleunigt, indem oft genutzte Daten griffbereit gehalten werden.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Cache is a small memory store near the processor that speeds things up by keeping frequently used data close at hand.

utterance_translations.text: Cache is a small memory store near the processor that speeds things up by keeping frequently used data close at hand.

utterances.source_text: Am Anfang war der Film verwirrend, aber dann fügte sich alles zusammen und er erwies sich als sehr klug.
utterances.production_ground_truth: At first the film was confusing, but then everything connected and it turned out to be very clever.

utterance_translations.text: At first the film was confusing, but then everything connected and it turned out to be very clever.

utterances.source_text: Es gab Probleme, aber Anpassungen wurden vorgenommen und die Gespräche könnten bald teilweise wieder aufgenommen werden.
utterances.production_ground_truth: There were problems, but adjustments have been made and talks may partially resume soon.

utterance_translations.text: There were problems, but adjustments have been made and talks may partially resume soon.

utterances.source_text: Ich hörte ein seltsames Geräusch, dann drehte sich das Auto plötzlich. Danach erinnere ich mich vor allem an zersplittertes Glas und jemanden, der meinen Namen schrie.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I heard a strange noise, then the car suddenly spun. After that, I mainly remember shattered glass and someone shouting my name.

utterance_translations.text: I heard a strange noise, then the car suddenly spun. After that, I mainly remember shattered glass and someone shouting my name.

utterances.source_text: Das Paket war als zugestellt markiert, aber an der Tür lag nichts, also habe ich umsonst gewartet und muss jetzt den Kundenservice anrufen.
utterances.production_ground_truth: The package was marked delivered, but nothing was at the door, so I waited for nothing and now have to call customer service.

utterance_translations.text: The package was marked delivered, but nothing was at the door, so I waited for nothing and now have to call customer service.
